evidence.claim: Built semantic search infrastructure using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Recently, I built our semantic search infrastructure from scratch — sentence-transformers, FAISS, the works.

evidence.claim: Trained and shipped ranking models using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.
Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system.

evidence.claim: Deployment of RAG chatbot cut average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets

evidence.claim: Completed LangChain for LLM Application Development certification
Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over theoretical background
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
